evidences.title: [PDF] monad / mon token – coinbase token sales disclosure1
evidences.content: herein. At the start of Monad Public Mainnet, 50.6B tokens (50.6%) will be locked. Locked tokens cannot be staked. The intent of this is twofold: to ensure that staking rewards initially contribute to the public circulation of MON and to avoid an initial concentration of rewards among those individuals (team members and investors) involved directly with the project. All locked tokens in the initial token supply are anticipated to be fully unlocked by the fourth anniversary of the Monad Public Mainnet launch in Q4 2029. Allocation Group Details Public Sale Up to 7.5B MON tokens (7.5% of initial token supply) will be made available to the public for purchase in the public sale via the Coinbase token sales platform at a price of $0.025 per token. This token sale offers the general public an [...] 38.5B MON tokens (38.5%) are expected to be allocated to Ecosystem Development; these tokens are unlocked and stewarded by the Monad Foundation. In total, approximately 49.4B MON tokens (49.4%) are unlocked on Day 1 of Monad Public Mainnet. Locked Tokens Tokens for all investors and team members, along with the Category Labs Treasury, are locked on Day 1 of Monad Public Mainnet and are sub...

evidences.title: Get early access to upcoming tokens - Coinbase
evidences.content: ## Previous sales ## Monad Nov 17, 2025 · 85.8k participants · 70 countries · $269M committed Monad is a new Layer 1 blockchain aiming to deliver breakthrough speed and enable new applications of blockchain technology. ## FAQs What is Token Sales? 󰀒 󰖦 Token Sales lets customers purchase new tokens directly from issuers shortly before the token’s listing on Coinbase. Are there any fees involved? What will it cost me? 󰀒 󰖦 There are no fees for token allocation orders. What payment methods can I use to participate in the token sale? 󰀒 󰖦 USDC. Additional payment methods may be supported in future sales. How can I verify my eligibility to participate in the token sale? 󰀒 󰖦 [...] If the total number of requested tokens is greater than the total available tokens, a distribution mechanism, called “filling up from the bottom,” attempts to create a broad distribution among sale participants and limit asset concentration among large buyers. The mechanism first identifies the user with the smallest unfilled amount (“the bottom”) and grants the specified amount to all requestors. The system then identifies the next smallest unfilled amount and grants that amount to all requestors. The system...

evidences.title: Coinbase Opens a New Chapter for Token Sales - NCFA Canada
evidences.content: Token Sales | Nov 13, 2025 Image: Freepik/diana.grytsku # A New Standard for Fair and Transparent Token Launches On November 10, 2025 Coinbase announced the launch of its new 2025 end-to-end token sales platform, with the goal is to make token launches more open, fair, and easy to understand, while helping projects build real communities and stable markets. The news is the return of U.S. retail access to public token sales for the first time since 2018, triggered by both market demand and a pro-crypto U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) who now says that most crypto tokens are not securities, a complete pivot from the Gensler years when regulators focused mainly on enforcement. ## Redesigning Token Sales for a Fairer Market [...] Magazine Advocacy Podcast Directory Fintech Whisperer News Research SUBSCRIBE November 13, 2025 Blockchain, Crypto, Digital Assets, Tokens, CBDCs, Stablecoins, Metaverse, NFTs, Enterprise, Scaleup, Entrepreneurs, Start-ups, Small Businesses, FinTech and Alternative Finance, Fintech International, Fintech Services, Fundraising, Investing, Trading, Innovation and Resources, Leadership, Competition, Human Capital, Health, Marketing, Strategy, Gro...
